# cr-vc-reference-apps

> Reference issuer + verifier Express services for the Costa Rica SSI driving ecosystem. Wraps @attestto/cr-vc-sdk. Two minimal apps any institution can clone, configure, and deploy.

## Repository structure

- `apps/issuer/` — Express service exposing POST /issue
- `apps/verifier/` — Express service exposing POST /verify with a static trust registry
- `examples/issue-and-verify.sh` — end-to-end curl demo
- `docker-compose.yml` — both services with shared network
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — typecheck + build + test on PRs to main

## Endpoints

### Issuer (default :3001)
- `POST /issue` — body: { type, subjectDid, claims, expirationDate?, id?, issuerInfo? } → signed VC
- `GET /health` — issuer DID + public key

### Verifier (default :3002)
- `POST /verify` — body: { credential, options? } → { valid, checks, errors, warnings, issuerTrusted }
- `GET /health` — trusted issuer count + list

## Trust registry model

The verifier reads a comma-separated `TRUSTED_ISSUERS` env var of `did|algorithm|base64url-publicKey` triples. This is intentionally simple — a future version will swap the static map for a live trust registry client.

## What this MVP does NOT do

- Revocation (StatusList2021 / CRL) — depends on CRLManager in @attestto/cr-vc-sdk
- Live trust registry lookup — env-based for now
- OpenID4VCI / OpenID4VP — tracked as ATT-494
- Admin UI / QR code input / persistent storage — out of scope
